mapper.select: select * from todos WHERE delete_flag = FALSE
select * from todos WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND delete_flag = FALSE
select * from todos WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND delete_flag = FALSE
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM customers WHERE customer_id = #{customerId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos ( todo_id, customer_id, status, task_content, deadline, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{todoId}, #{customerId}, #{status}, #{taskContent}, #{deadline}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET status = #{status}, task_content = #{taskContent}, deadline = #{deadline}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE todo_id = #{todoId}
UPDATE todos SET delete_flag = TRUE WHERE todo_id = #{todoId}
